Vector3 Class Reference

3D Vector representation. It is an old version of the Vector class defined in the Galileo project. http://www.cs.utah.edu/~boulos/galileo/ More...

#include <Vector3.h>

Public Attributes

float e [3]

Detailed Description

3D Vector representation. It is an old version of the Vector class defined in the Galileo project. http://www.cs.utah.edu/~boulos/galileo/
